title: Mobile Application Developer (React Native)
description: About Scate AI Scate AI is a company focused on transforming AI into products that millions of people can use, with the goal of shaping the usage habits of the future.We leverage existing AI technologies to replace traditional user habits and build products that can take their place in everyday life. Our focus is clear:Take what AI can already doTurn it into real, usable productsAnd integrate it into how people live, work, and interact Position We are looking for a React Native Developer who can build and scale consumer products used by millions of users. This role sits at the intersection of: Mobile development Product thinking System design Execution You will work on developing, launching, and improving mobile applications while collaborating closely with product, growth, design, and engineering teams. We are looking for builders who can move fast, take ownership, and turn ideas into production-ready products. Requirements 4+ years of professional experience in React Native development Strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript Deep understanding of React Native architecture, performance optimization, and native module integrations Experience with state management solutions such as Redux, Zustand, MobX, or similar Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, authentication mechanisms, and mobile networking Solid understanding of software architecture patterns and scalable application design Ability to build, debug, and maintain backend services when necessary Experience with backend technologies such as Node.js, Python, Go, or similarStrong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills Ability to work independently in a fast-paced startup environment Experience publishing and maintaining applications on both the App Store and Google Play Strong ownership mentality you take responsibility for outcomes, not just tasks Fluency in English Main Responsibilities Mobile Product Development Develop and maintain high-performance cross-platform applications using React Native Architect scalable, maintainable, and reusable mobile applications Optimize application performance, responsiveness, and user experience across iOS and Android platforms Rapidly prototype, validate, and iterate on new product ideas Translate product requirements into production-ready mobile experiences Systems & Engineering Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs when needed Participate in technical architecture discussions and contribute to engineering decisions Apply clean code principles, testing strategies, and software engineering best practices Build reliable and scalable systems that support product growth Product & Collaboration Work closely with product, design, growth, and engineering teams Contribute to product decisions with an engineering perspective Help identify technical opportunities and constraints early in the product lifecycle Collaborate with designers to deliver high-quality user experiences Continuous Improvement Utilize source control, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and release management processes Continuously improve application quality, maintainability, and development workflows Stay up to date with emerging technologies and modern development practices Leverage AI tools to improve development speed, automation, and product experiences Nice to Have Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure Experience with databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, or Redis Experience with GraphQL and real-time communication technologies Knowledge of Swift and/or KotlinExperience with analytics, attribution, subscription, and monetization SDKs Experience with CI/CD pipelines and mobile release automation Experience working with Figma and collaborating closely with design teams Experience building AI-powered products or integrating AI services into mobile applications AI Enthusiast: Actively follows advancements in AI, experiments with AI tools, and leverages AI to improve development workflows, automation, and product experiences The Recruiting Process Application Case Study Talent & Culture Interview Technical Interview Final Interview

title: Software Engineer - Backend (Remote)
description: Role : Backend Engineer Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $20 - $70/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Backend Engineer to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable backend systems to support high-performance applications. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement efficient APIs and data pipelines. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, and deploy robust backend services using modern frameworks and tools. • Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability for global users. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices. • Debug and resolve issues in production environments with a focus on uptime. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in backend programming languages such as Python, Java, or Go. • Experience with RESTful and GraphQL API development and integration. • Strong understanding of databases (SQL and NoSQL) and query optimization. • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes). • Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and version control systems like Git. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development | Technology, Information and Internet | IT Services and IT Consulting | Information Services industry, contributing to the development of high-impact backend systems. The contract includes flexibility to work across time zones and deliver solutions that scale globally. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Full Stack Developer
description: FULL STACK DEVELOPER ŞİRKET HAKKINDA Grava ekibi olarak; kurumsal web uygulamaları, otomasyon sistemleri ve cross-platform yazılım geliştirme alanlarında ulusal ve uluslararası ölçekte projelere imza atıyoruz. Bu vizyonu bizimle paylaşacak, yenilikçi projelerimizde fark yaratacak ve geleceğin teknolojilerine yön verecek yeni Full Stack Developer ekip arkadaşlarımızı arıyoruz. Yeni çalışma arkadaşımızın, .NET Core MVC tabanlı kurumsal projelerimizde ve cross-platform uygulamalarımızda ekiple birlikte değer üretmesini arzuluyoruz. Yalnızca görevlerin kodlandığı bir yapıdan ziyade; teknik kararların masaya yatırıldığı, fikir alışverişinin desteklendiği ve ekibimizdeki herkesin projelere kendi vizyonunu katabildiği şeffaf bir geliştirme kültürü sunuyoruz. Aynı zamanda robotik sistemler, bağlantılı cihazlar, yerel yapay zekâ model entegrasyonu, fine-tuning ve LLM tabanlı otomasyon gibi heyecan verici Ar-Ge projelerimizde de bu yenilikçi yolculuğu hep birlikte deneyimlemeyi hedefliyoruz. TEKNİK PROFİL & YETKİNLİKLER Yeni takım arkadaşımızla ortak bir teknik dili konuşabilmek ve projelere hızla adapte olabilmek adına önem verdiğimiz yetkinlikler: • HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, AJAX, PWA ve React Native ekosistemine hâkimiyet • C# / .NET, ASP.NET Core MVC ve Web API süreçlerinde tecrübe • Entity Framework Core, LINQ, MS SQL Server, PostgreSQL ve Redis kullanımı • RESTful API, SignalR ve Hangfire konularında yetkinlik • Git, GitHub ve Docker süreçlerini aktif kullanabilme • API ve LLM tabanlı yapay zekâ çözümlerine, model geliştirme süreçlerine ve otomasyon sistemlerine karşı yüksek ilgi • Proje hedeflerine uyum ve ekip içi şeffaf iletişime değer verme LIFE AT GRAVA Grava’da teknoloji kadar insanı, sonuç kadar süreci ve bireysel yetkinlik kadar ekip ruhunu önemsiyoruz. Fikirlerin özgürce paylaşıldığı, yeni teknolojilerin birlikte keşfedildiği ve gelişimin desteklendiği modern bir çalışma kültürü oluşturuyoruz. Esnekliği, profesyonelliği, samimiyeti ve yüksek ekip enerjisini aynı yapıda buluşturarak herkesin özgürce üretebildiği ve şirketle birlikte büyüyebildiği bir çalışma deneyimi sunuyoruz. • GRAVA Flex: Dönemsel hibrit çalışma modeliyle, ofis sınırlarının dışına çıkarak evden, kafeden veya dilediğiniz şehirden özgürce çalışabileceğiniz esnek bir çalışma deneyimi • Build the Future: GRAVA Lab ile yeni fikirlerin değerlendirildiği, deneysel teknolojilerin keşfedildiği ve herkesin projelere kendi vizyonunu katabildiği canlı bir inovasyon kültürü • Grow at GRAVA: Dev Talks, GRAVA Conference Pass, sektörel fuarlar ve profesyonel etkinliklerle uzmanlığınızı geliştirebileceğiniz; başarılarınız ve yetkinlikleriniz doğrultusunda kariyer basamaklarında ilerleyerek yeni pozisyonlara ve liderlik rollerine ulaşabileceğiniz şeffaf bir gelişim yolu • GRAVA Core: Kurumsal standartları belirlenmiş yazılım mimarileri, ortak bileşenler, hazır altyapılar, kod kütüphaneleri ve tekrar kullanılabilir sistemlerden oluşan gelişmiş GRAVA ekosistemiyle; kod karmaşasından uzak, sürdürülebilir ve projelere hızlı adaptasyon sağlayan bir geliştirme deneyimi • AI-Powered Workspace: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini ve benzeri premium yapay zekâ araçlarının yanı sıra modern geliştirici araçlarıyla araştırma, geliştirme ve üretim süreçlerinizi güçlendiren teknoloji odaklı bir çalışma ortamı • GRAVA Cloud Workspace: Yüksek performanslı VDI ve RDP altyapısıyla, kişisel bilgisayarınızın donanım sınırlarına takılmadan güncel geliştirme araçlarına ve güçlü çalışma ortamlarına erişim • GRAVA Social: Happy hour etkinlikleri, GRAVA Game Night, ekip yemekleri ve dönemsel sosyal organizasyonlarla ekip bağlarını güçlendiren ve birlikte keyifli zaman geçirmeyi destekleyen dinamik bir sosyal ortam • GRAVA Balance: Focus Day, GRAVA Reset Day, Birthday Leave, esnek çalışma saatleri, dönemsel Casual Day etkinlikleri ve iş-özel hayat dengesini destekleyen modern çalışma olanakları • GRAVA Spotlight: Güçlü fikirlerin, ekip dayanışmasının, bireysel katkıların, yenilikçi çözümlerin ve ortaya çıkarılan gerçek etkinin görünür biçimde takdir edildiği bir çalışma kültürü Grava’da profesyonellik ile samimiyetin, kurumsal disiplin ile genç ve dinamik ekip ruhunun birbirini tamamladığı bir çalışma ortamı oluşturmayı hedefliyoruz. Çünkü güçlü ürünlerin yalnızca güçlü teknolojilerle değil; fikirleri önemsenen, gelişimi desteklenen, başarıları takdir edilen ve birlikte üretmekten keyif alan ekiplerle ortaya çıktığına inanıyoruz. BAŞVURU Yazılım dünyasının sınırlarını otomasyon, yapay zekâ ve yeni nesil teknolojilerle genişlettiğimiz bu yolculuğa ortak olmak ve küresel ölçekteki projelerimizde iz bırakmak isterseniz, sizinle tanışmayı ve detayları konuşmayı çok isteriz. Özgeçmişinizi, GitHub profil bağlantınızı ve varsa portföyünüzü join@gravaglobal.com adresi üzerinden bizimle paylaşabilirsiniz. ──────────────────────── FULL STACK DEVELOPER ABOUT THE COMPANY As the Grava team, we build national and international projects across enterprise web applications, automation systems, and cross-platform software development. We are looking for Full Stack Developer teammates who share our vision, want to make a meaningful impact on innovative projects, and are excited to help shape the technologies of the future. We want our new teammate to create value together with us across our .NET Core MVC-based enterprise projects and cross-platform applications. Rather than offering an environment where tasks are simply assigned and coded, we foster a transparent development culture where technical decisions are openly discussed, ideas are encouraged, and every team member can bring their own perspective and vision to the product. You will also have the opportunity to take part in an exciting R&D journey involving robotics systems, connected devices, local AI model integration, fine-tuning, and LLM-based automation. TECHNICAL PROFILE & COMPETENCIES The competencies we value in order to build a shared technical language and adapt quickly to our projects include: • Strong command of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, AJAX, PWA, and the React Native ecosystem • Experience with C# / .NET, ASP.NET Core MVC, and Web API development • Experience with Entity Framework Core, LINQ, MS SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and Redis • Proficiency in RESTful APIs, SignalR, and Hangfire • Active use of Git, GitHub, and Docker workflows • Strong interest in API- and LLM-based AI solutions, model development processes, and automation systems • Alignment with project goals and a commitment to transparent team communication LIFE AT GRAVA At Grava, we value people as much as technology, the process as much as the outcome, and team spirit as much as individual expertise. We are building a modern working culture where ideas are shared freely, new technologies are explored together, and growth is actively supported. By bringing flexibility, professionalism, sincerity, and high team energy into the same environment, we offer a working experience where everyone can create freely and grow together with the company. • GRAVA Flex: A flexible working experience through a periodic hybrid model that allows you to step beyond the office and work freely from home, a café, or the city of your choice • Build the Future: A dynamic innovation culture shaped through GRAVA Lab, where new ideas are evaluated, experimental technologies are explored, and everyone can bring their own vision into the projects • Grow at GRAVA: A transparent growth path where you can develop your expertise through Dev Talks, GRAVA Conference Pass, industry fairs, and professional events; and progress into new positions and leadership roles based on your achievements and competencies • GRAVA Core: A development experience powered by an advanced GRAVA ecosystem consisting of software architectures, shared components, ready-to-use infrastructures, code libraries, and reusable systems built around defined corporate standards; enabling sustainable development, rapid project adaptation, and freedom from code clutter • AI-Powered Workspace: A technology-focused working environment that strengthens your research, development, and production processes with premium AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini, alongside modern developer tools • GRAVA Cloud Workspace: Access to powerful development environments and up-to-date tools through high-performance VDI and RDP infrastructure, without being limited by your personal computer’s hardware • GRAVA Social: A dynamic social environment that strengthens team bonds and supports enjoyable time together through happy hour events, GRAVA Game Night, team dinners, and periodic social organizations • GRAVA Balance: Modern working practices that support work-life balance, including Focus Day, GRAVA Reset Day, Birthday Leave, flexible working hours, and periodic Casual Day events • GRAVA Spotlight: A culture where strong ideas, team collaboration, individual contributions, innovative solutions, and real impact are visibly recognized At Grava, we aim to build a working environment where professionalism and sincerity, corporate discipline and young, dynamic team spirit complement each other. Because we believe that strong products are created not only through strong technologies, but also by teams whose ideas are valued, whose growth is supported, whose achievements are recognized, and who enjoy building together. APPLICATION If you would like to join a journey where we are expanding the boundaries of software through automation, AI, and next-generation technologies while leaving your mark on global-scale projects, we would be delighted to meet you and discuss the details. You can send your CV, GitHub profile, and portfolio, if available, to join@gravaglobal.com.

title: Mid-Level Full Stack Developer
description: About Us Maven Insights and Solutions (Maven Insights) is a boutique management consulting firm headquartered in Dubai, the United Arab Emirates. We have a diverse team of innovative and dynamic experts and consultants. Our team works with a network of reputable clients and partners in the EMEA region including large organizations operating in telecom, technology, government, banking, insurance, real estate development, retail, services, chemicals, e-commerce and transportation sectors. We are seeking a passionate full stack engineer to join us on our journey and help build the future of our services. From day one, you will be part of a tech-focused, agile team dedicated to helping Maven Insights and its clients, some of the region’s most innovative and influential organizations, perform at their best. Requirements: Qualifications: • Bachelor's degree (BSc or equivalent) in Computer Science or a related field. • Minimum 3 years of relevant experience. • Active GitHub profile demonstrating personal projects or open-source contributions. • Strong verbal and written communication skills in both English and Turkish. Core Technical Skills: • Front-end development using React, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and SCSS. • Back-end development with Node.js. • Strong knowledge of AWS Serverless architecture (Lambda, API Gateway, S3, Cognito, CloudFront) and AWS CDK. • Experience with RESTful and GraphQL APIs. • Proficiency in MongoDB, MQL, and aggregation framework. • Strong understanding of Git, branching strategies, pull requests, GitHub Actions, Dependabot, npm, and dependency management. • Ability to build responsive, accessible, user-friendly applications from UI designs.• Familiarity with web infrastructure, including HTTP, DNS, and web hosting. Additional knowledge: • UI component libraries such as Bootstrap, Angular Material, Materialize, or Ionic. • Cross-browser testing, debugging, and SEO best practices. • OOP, Design Patterns, and SOLID principles. • SDLC and CI/CD methodologies. • Basic use of Photoshop, Adobe XD, or Figma for design adjustments. • Hybrid mobile app development using React Native, Ionic, or Capacitor. • Testing methodologies and tools, including unit, integration, end-to-end, load, and accessibility testing (Jest, Jasmine, Cypress, JMeter). Familiarity / Nice to Have: • Microservices and containerization using Docker and Kubernetes. • Agile methodologies, including Scrum and Kanban. • AI technologies and AI-powered applications, including AI-assisted software development for code generation, review, and optimization. Responsibilities • Develop new frontend features and backend services while maintaining existing systems. • Build standardized and reusable code and libraries for future use. • Participate in code reviews. • Troubleshoot production issues. • Write automated tests. • Contribute to technical documentation. • Contribute to architecture decisions and provide realistic development estimates. • Optimize applications for maximum performance and scalability. • Ensure proper validation of data exchanged between frontend and backend. • Collaborate with other team members and stakeholders. • Maintain high code quality and application consistency. • Stay up-to-date on emerging technologies

title: Frontend Engineer - Vue.js (Remote)
description: Role : Frontend Engineer - Vue.js (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $20 - $45/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Frontend Developer (Vue.js) to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining user-facing interfaces using Vue.js and related technologies. Candidates will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, responsive solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and optimize frontend applications using Vue.js, ensuring high performance and accessibility. • Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement responsive and intuitive user interfaces. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions for frontend systems. • Troubleshoot and resolve issues in existing frontend applications to improve functionality. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in Vue.js and modern JavaScript frameworks, with a strong understanding of component-based architecture. • Experience with state management libraries such as Vuex or Pinia. • Familiarity with frontend build tools like Webpack, Vite, or similar. • Knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles. • Experience with testing frameworks such as Jest or Cypress. • Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. • Ability to work independently in a remote environment with minimal supervision. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development industry, contributing to the creation of scalable web applications. The project involves integrating third-party APIs to enhance platform functionality. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Contract-Based Backend Developer (.NET Core)
description: Contract-Based Backend Developer (.NET Core) Konum: İstanbul (Uzaktan çalışma) Çalışma Şekli: Contract-based, Remote, 9 ay süreli proje Deneyim: 5+ yıl Ettuso olarak , Finans sektöründeki bir müşterimiz için yüksek hacimli, event-driven bir sistemde çalışacak deneyimli bir Backend Developer arıyoruz. 9 ay sürecek bu proje bazlı çalışmada, real-time veri akışı ve event processing konularında güçlü bir teknik arka plana sahip, finans sektörünün hassasiyetlerine (güvenlik, veri bütünlüğü, uyumluluk) aşina bir profil bekliyoruz. Aranan Nitelikler .NET Core ile en az 5-6 yıl backend geliştirme deneyimi Kafka ve Redis ile aktif çalışmış olmak Event-driven mimari tasarımı ve implementasyonu konusunda tecrübe Complex Event Processing (CEP) araçlarında (örn. Esper, Flink CEP, Apache Storm vb.) çalışmış olmak Real-time data streaming projelerinde yer almış olmak MSSQL ve PostgreSQL ile çalışma deneyimi Yüksek hacimli, düşük gecikmeli (low-latency) sistemler kurgulama tecrübesi Bağımsız çalışabilme, distributed sistemlerde sorun giderme yeteneği AI araçlarını development süreçlerinde aktif şekilde kullanma tecrübesi Tercih Sebepleri Bankacılık / finans sektöründe çalışmış olmak Mikroservis mimarisi deneyimi Docker / Kubernetes bilgisi Cloud platformlarında (Azure/AWS) deneyim CI/CD pipeline kurulumu tecrübesi Proje Detayları Süre: 9 ay (contract-based / freelance) Çalışma modeli: Uzaktan (Remote)
